title: Rail
description: A power supply rail with its decoupling requirements

id.description: Internal identifier for this rail, referenced by pin rail fields (e.g. vplus, vdd_core)

net.description: Net name in the schematic (e.g. VCC_3V3, GND)

type.description: power: externally supplied rail. internal_node: generated internally (e.g. LDO output).

input_filter.description: Passive filter components placed on the input of this rail (e.g. ferrite bead)

bulk_decoupling.description: Large bulk decoupling capacitors placed near the component

remark.description: Free-form note about this rail (e.g. must be sequenced before DVDD, shared with another supply)
